properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 104/18

ANDOYA SPACE CENTER WILL  LAUNCH A TEST ROCKET  IN THE PERIOD  17 SEP TO  3 OCT 2018. THE LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 0800 AND 1600 UTC, IN THE ANOUNCED PERIOD.SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA.

HAZARD AREAS:
AREA 1: CIRCLE WITH CENTER 70-42.9N-01335.9E AND RADIUS 36NM.

AREA 2: CORRIDOR WITH POSITIONS
A. 70-10.3N 014-28.0E.
B. 70-11.7N 014-34.7E.
C. 69-18.7N 016-04.0E.
D. 69 17.7N 016-01.2E.
E. 69 17.3N 015 57.0E.
F. 70 10.3N 014 28.0E.

IT WILL BE POSSIBLE TO TRANSIT THRU THE CORRIODR WITH BEST COURSE AND SPEED
REEFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 16/2018
